data.title: 国际服LINE Stickers表情包第二弹上线
data.summary: Sensei, the second official Blue Archive LINE sticker set has been released! Come meet Blue Archive
data.body:
Sensei, the second official Blue Archive LINE sticker set has been released!
Come meet Blue Archive on LINE now~ 🍀

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3302524

#BlueArchive #LINE
